arts.ttl: Coventry City man completes loan move in final months of contract
arts.sum: Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group. Coventry City striker Fabio Tavares has joined League One side Burton Albion on loan for the remainder of the season.

arts.ttl: Frank Lampard drops transfer hint as huge Coventry City fan in 'great shape' continues to train at hometown club
arts.sum: Asked how the arrangement is going – the versatile forward having initially come in to get fit and help City out in terms of numbers on the training pitch after a short spell at MLS outfit Charlotte FC, based in North Carolina, USA - Lampard, who is clearly impressed with the player who can play as a left wing, attacking midfielder or second striker, revealed: “He’s still training with us and he’s been brilliant in the dressing room. I think at this moment we are there to help him get fit and although it’s slightly unusual, he’s a Coventry lad and the fact of his connections and being a fan of the club.

arts.ttl: Every player linked with Coventry City transfer interest so far this month - Andy Turner
arts.sum: The Sun’s transfer specialist Alan Nixon claimed he could join Derby in another loan spell, while TEAMtalk reported that number of clubs have registered an interest in signing the 21-year-old, including Sheffield United, Coventry City, Middlesbrough, Queens Park Rangers and Stoke City. City, along with Hull and Watford are among a host of Championship clubs chasing Reading FC defender Tyler Bindon in the January transfer window, claimed Football League World, which says the Royals are bracing themselves for offers for the New Zealand international as the player enter the final six months of his contract at the club.
